title: Hearing EIB 25-23(R): In the Matter of Proposed Adoption of 20.2.92 NMAC â€“ Clean Transportation Fuel Program
content: The New Mexico Environmental Improvement Board (â€œEIBâ€) will hold a public hearing beginning on September 22, 2025, at 9:00 am through October 3, 2025, resuming at 9:00 am on November 17, 2025 and continuing as long as required to hear all testimony, evidence, and public comment, regarding the proposed New Mexico Clean Transportation Fuel Standard.
author: Analysts Account
